highlights: Caring services were recorded 1497 times across counseling and intervention workflows.
Healing supports averaged a health score of 3.18 while 71 incidents were resolved.
Teaching-related records helped sustain average education progress of 78.3% across the reporting period.
annualReport.narrativeSummary: The annual accomplishment report highlights 60 residents served, 19 completed reintegrations, and 293707.81 in donation value. Top investment areas included Operations, Education, Wellbeing, while Caring, Healing, and Teaching remained the dominant service themes.
